title: The 10-Second Rule Every Godly Man Runs By
caption:
Every impulse you've got runs on speed. It wants a decision before you've had time to think.

The text you shouldn't send. The tab you shouldn't open. The third plate, the hot reply, the thing you'll regret by morning. None of it is really about what's in front of you. It's anger, boredom, loneliness, or pride wearing a costume.

Here's the rule: ten seconds, before your hand moves. Name what's actually driving. Pray one line. Ask who this serves, you right now or the man you're becoming. Then spend the ten seconds on obedience, not just delay.

"Whoever is slow to anger is better than the mighty, and he who rules his spirit than he who takes a city." — Proverbs 16:32

Self-control isn't repression. It's deciding who's actually in charge before the moment decides for you.

Save this for the next time it moves fast.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #proverbs #scripture #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
